zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthouts於1360年出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特也-黑達歐根包斯時，她的父親Jan Arnoud Berthout Bac30歲，母親Lijsbeth van Mieren27歲。她於大約1378年與Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Driel結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1422年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthouts于1360年出生在荷兰努-布拉班特也-黑達歐根包斯时，她的父亲Jan Arnoud Berthout Bac30岁，母亲Lijsbeth van Mieren27岁。她于大约1378年与Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Driel结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1422年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Bac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish (also Bać): perhaps a variant of Bacz, from a pet form of the personal name Bartłomiej (see Bartholomew ), occuring in southeastern Poland. Aternatively, it may be a metonymic occupational name derived from baca ‘shepherd’. Compare Batz .
French: from bac ‘tub, trough’, probably applied as a metonymic occupational name or as a topographic name.

variants.name: Bartholomew
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Bertilmew, Bertelmy, a borrowing of the Old French form of the Biblical personal name Bartholomew (from Latin Bartholomaeus; Hebrew ‘son of Talmai’, said to mean ‘having many furrows’, i.e. rich in land). This was an extremely popular personal name in Christian Europe, with many vernacular derivatives. It derived its popularity from the apostle Saint Bartholomew (Matthew 10:3), who was, among other things, the patron saint of tanners, vintners, and butlers.
As an Irish name, it has been used as an Anglicized form of Mac Pharthaláin (see McFarlane ).

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: Arnoud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthouts was born in 1360, in 's-Hertogenbosch, North Brabant, Netherlands, her father, Jan Arnoud Berthout Bac, was 30 and her mother, Lijsbeth van Mieren, was 27. She married Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Driel about 1378. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died after 1422.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthouts est née en 1360, à 's-Hertogenbosch, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Jan Arnoud Berthout Bac, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lijsbeth van Mieren, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Driel environ 1378. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1422.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthouts 1360 in 's-Hertogenbosch, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jan Arnoud Berthout Bac 30 und ihre Mutter Lijsbeth van Mieren 27. Sie hat um 1378 Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Driel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1422.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthouts è nata il nel 1360 nel 's-Hertogenbosch, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Jan Arnoud Berthout Bac, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lijsbeth van Mieren, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Driel circa 1378. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1422.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthoutsが1360年にオランダノオルド-ブラバント'ス-ハートジェンボッシュで生まれた時，父Jan Arnoud Berthout Bacは30歳，母Lijsbeth van Mierenは27歳であった。約1378年にJan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Drielと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1422年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthouts(이)가 1360년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 '스-헤르토겐보슈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jan Arnoud Berthout Bac(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lijsbeth van Mieren(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1378년 Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Driel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1422년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthouts nasceu em 1360, em 's-Hertogenbosch, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Jan Arnoud Berthout Bac, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lijsbeth van Mieren, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Driel aproximadamente 1378. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1422.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthouts родилась в 1360 г. в местности 'с-хиртодженбощ, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Jan Arnoud Berthout Bac было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lijsbeth van Mieren, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Driel около 1378 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1422 г.
